response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The audio lyrics matched the provided reference lyrics perfectly. The introductory dialogue was transcribed manually with high accuracy.
2. JSON Usage: Fully used the provided lyrics for the song performance portion, and performed manual transcription/translation for the dialogue in Scene 1 and the custom birthday greeting interaction.
3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are precisely aligned to the vocal onset and offset, ensuring there are no overlapping timecodes or cascading delays. Conversational speech flows naturally with semantic continuity.

subtitles.original: え？何？何？みなさん、こんにちは。
subtitles.english: Eh? What? What? Hello everyone!

subtitles.original: うわ、本当に、本当にりなみお姉...
subtitles.english: Wow, it's really, really Rinami-onee...

subtitles.original: これ、本当にりなみさんですか？
subtitles.english: Is this... Is this really Rinami-san?

subtitles.original: はい！初めまして！
subtitles.english: Yes! Nice to meet you!

subtitles.original: 今日はご一緒できて光栄です！ / あ、はい！
subtitles.english: I'm honored to be with you today! / Ah, yes!

subtitles.original: なんて呼んだらいいですか？
subtitles.english: What should I call you?

subtitles.original: あ、あの、あの敬語やめてください。あの、吾輩のことは...
subtitles.english: Ah, um, please stop using polite language. Um, about me...

subtitles.original: あの、ラプ...ラプ君って呼んでください。
subtitles.english: Um, please call me Lap-kun.

subtitles.original: 吾輩も、りなみお姉さんって呼んでもいいですか？
subtitles.english: Can I call you Rinami-oneesan too?

subtitles.original: もちろん！
subtitles.english: Of course!

subtitles.original: りなみお姉さんって呼んでくれると嬉しいな、ラプ君！
subtitles.english: I'd be happy if you call me Rinami-oneesan, Lap-kun!

subtitles.original: りなみお姉さん... / はい！
subtitles.english: Rinami-oneesan... / Yes!

subtitles.original: ラプ君！ / はい！
subtitles.english: Lap-kun! / Yes!

subtitles.original: 今日は私の曲を披露させてもらうんだけど...
subtitles.english: Today I'm going to perform my song,

subtitles.original: ラプ君も会場を盛り上げるために、ちょっとだけ一緒に参加してくれるんだよね？
subtitles.english: and Lap-kun, you're going to join in a bit to help pump up the venue, right?

subtitles.original: はい、あの、恐縮です。あの、本当はちょっとこんな近くで見れるだけでも、嬉しいんですけど...
subtitles.english: Yes, um, I'm humbled. Actually, I'm just happy to be able to watch from this close, but...

subtitles.original: 微力ながら、参加させていただきます！
subtitles.english: though of little help, I will participate!

subtitles.original: うん！一緒に共演できて嬉しいよ！
subtitles.english: Yeah! I'm happy we can perform together!

subtitles.original: 素敵なライブになるといいね！
subtitles.english: I hope it turns out to be a wonderful live concert!

subtitles.original: はい！
subtitles.english: Yes!

subtitles.original: それじゃあ、早速一曲、披露させてもらおうかな？
subtitles.english: Then, shall I perform a song right away?

subtitles.original: ラプ君、準備はいい？
subtitles.english: Lap-kun, are you ready?

subtitles.original: あ、はい！もちろん、あの、行きます、準備します、あ、行きます！
subtitles.english: Ah, yes! Of course, um, here I go, I'll get ready, ah, here I go!

subtitles.original: みんなも一緒に楽しもうね！
subtitles.english: Let's all have fun together!

subtitles.original: それでは一曲目、聴いてください！
subtitles.english: Now, please listen to the first song!

subtitles.original: I know 愛のボーダー
subtitles.english: I know, love's border

subtitles.original: 今日は少しだけ 飛び越えてみちゃおっか
subtitles.english: Shall we try jumping over it just a little bit today?

subtitles.original: 全然ハジマンナイ物語を見ているような気分
subtitles.english: It feels like I'm watching a story that hasn't started at all

subtitles.original: 鈍感な君にお知らせします
subtitles.english: I'll let you know, you're oblivious

subtitles.original: このままいけばエンドロールで you＝エキストラA
subtitles.english: If we keep going like this, you'll be 'Extra A' in the end credits

subtitles.original: すぐ逸らすその目も 待てど出ないロマンスの芽も
subtitles.english: That gaze that looks away, and the bud of romance that won't sprout no matter how long I wait

subtitles.original: 「ねえねえ、ちょっとおでこ貸して♪」でラブもデコっちゃう？
subtitles.english: 'Hey, hey, lend me your forehead for a bit ♪' Want to decorate our love with that?

subtitles.original: 急な「ぎゅっ」でキュンもcute 私のcue受け取ってよ
subtitles.english: Sudden 'tight squeeze', the heart-throb is cute too, please accept my cue

subtitles.original: 超えてく展開見てみたいの
subtitles.english: I want to see a development that goes beyond this

subtitles.original: 私からモーションじゃ王道すぎるでしょ？
subtitles.english: If I'm the one who makes a move, it's too cliché, right?

subtitles.original: 36℃ウブな君にcaution！
subtitles.english: 36°C, caution for you, you naive boy!

subtitles.original: もうちょい私にお熱をあげて欲しいのです
subtitles.english: I want you to be a little more passionate about me

subtitles.original: 君にとって私は一体何なの？
subtitles.english: What on earth am I to you?

subtitles.original: はい、ど～ぞ ここからは君の番
subtitles.english: Yes, go ahead, from here on, it's your turn

subtitles.original: 上手く言おうとなんてしないで
subtitles.english: Don't try to say it perfectly

subtitles.original: ちょっと不自然くらいじゃなきゃ
subtitles.english: If it's not a little bit unnatural

subtitles.original: 恋なんてそう始まりようがないもの
subtitles.english: Love wouldn't have a way to start like that

subtitles.original: かくかくしかじか... つまりはlove song
subtitles.english: This and that... in short, it's a love song

subtitles.original: 出来不出来は横に置いて耽溺を希望
subtitles.english: Setting aside whether it's good or bad, I'm hoping to be addicted

subtitles.original: ちょっとhighな熱いloveにうなされてみない？
subtitles.english: Want to try being possessed by a slightly high, hot love?

subtitles.original: キホンのキホン 恋の三大 cha cha cha
subtitles.english: Basic of the basics, the three major cha-cha-chas of love

subtitles.original: chance・chase・challenge
subtitles.english: chance, chase, challenge

subtitles.original: 用のないメッセージ さりげないタッチ
subtitles.english: Useless messages, casual touches

subtitles.original: 翻訳すればすべてがつまりラビュー
subtitles.english: When translated, everything is, in short, love-u

subtitles.original: 頭で考えずに脊髄反射で応えて
subtitles.english: Don't think with your head, respond with a spinal reflex

subtitles.original: no noだけじゃ能がないよ
subtitles.english: Just 'no, no' is no good

subtitles.original: そうよ あとちょっと もう一歩
subtitles.english: Yes, just a little more, one more step

subtitles.original: やればできる子 素直でよろしい
subtitles.english: You're a kid who can do it if you try, I like you being honest

subtitles.original: 36℃ニブい君にcaution！
subtitles.english: 36°C, caution for you, you dull boy!

subtitles.original: 「どうせ・だって・でもでも」なんて3Dを抜け出して
subtitles.english: Break out of the 3D 'anyway, because, but, but' stuff

subtitles.original: 異次元的ステキをいっぱい感じて
subtitles.english: Feel lots of otherworldly wonderful things

subtitles.original: はい、ど～ぞ ここからは君の番
subtitles.english: Yes, go ahead, from here on, it's your turn

subtitles.original: 「違うかも...」なんて構えないで
subtitles.english: Don't get defensive thinking 'Maybe I'm wrong...'

subtitles.original: ちょっとくらいの勘違いがなきゃ
subtitles.english: If there isn't a little bit of misunderstanding

subtitles.original: 恋なんてそう始まりようがないもの
subtitles.english: Love wouldn't have a way to start like that

subtitles.original: ラプ君、お誕生日おめでとう！
subtitles.english: Lap-kun, happy birthday!

subtitles.original: えっ！？あ、ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Eh!? Th-Thank you very much!

subtitles.original: 一緒に！クラップ！
subtitles.english: Together! Clap!

subtitles.original: はい、はい、はい、はい！
subtitles.english: Yes, yes, yes, yes!

subtitles.original: 「ねえねえ、ちょっとおでこ貸して♪」でラブもデコっちゃう？
subtitles.english: 'Hey, hey, lend me your forehead for a bit ♪' Want to decorate our love with that?

subtitles.original: 急な「ぎゅっ」でキュンもcute 私のcue受け取ってよ
subtitles.english: Sudden 'tight squeeze', the heart-throb is cute too, please accept my cue

subtitles.original: 予感に身を委ねてみたいの
subtitles.english: I want to entrust my body to a premonition

subtitles.original: 私からモーションじゃ王道すぎるでしょ？
subtitles.english: If I'm the one who makes a move, it's too cliché, right?
